'''gapuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:waferer|waferer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-p-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waferer|waferer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gapuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæpizith|gæpizith]] || [[word:gæpizij|gæpizij]] || [[word:gæpizish|gæpizish]] || [[word:gæpizi|gæpizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gapupuzuth|gapupuzuth]] || [[word:gapupuzuj|gapupuzuj]] || [[word:gapupuzush|gapupuzush]] || [[word:gapupuzu|gapupuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gapuzuth|gapuzuth]] || [[word:gapuzuj|gapuzuj]] || [[word:gapuzush|gapuzush]] || [[word:gapuzu|gapuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gapufzuth|gapufzuth]] || [[word:gapufzuj|gapufzuj]] || [[word:gapufzush|gapufzush]] || [[word:gapufzuf|gapufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gapuzuthu|gapuzuthu]] || [[word:gapuzuju|gapuzuju]] || [[word:gapuzushu|gapuzushu]] || [[word:gapuzuku|gapuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gapuzuth|gapuzuth]] || [[word:gapuzuj|gapuzuj]] || [[word:gapuzush|gapuzush]] || [[word:gapuzu|gapuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gapuzuthul|gapuzuthul]] || [[word:gapuzujul|gapuzujul]] || [[word:gapuzushul|gapuzushul]] || [[word:gapuzukul|gapuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gapuzuthuthu|gapuzuthuthu]] || [[word:gapuzujuju|gapuzujuju]] || [[word:gapuzushushu|gapuzushushu]] || [[word:gapuzuku|gapuzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gapuzuthun|gapuzuthun]] || [[word:gapuzujun|gapuzujun]] || [[word:gapuzushun|gapuzushun]] || [[word:gapuzukun|gapuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gapuzuthuoro|gapuzuthuoro]] || [[word:gapuzujuoro|gapuzujuoro]] || [[word:gapuzushuoro|gapuzushuoro]] || [[word:gapuzukuoro|gapuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
